data.acceptance:
# Acceptance criteria

## AC-1 — All three call sites removed

`grep -rn "normalizeAgentIdentity" src/lib/terminal-manager*.ts`
returns zero hits.

## AC-2 — Per-site investigation captured in a handoff capsule

For each of the three sites, the handoff capsule on this knot records:

- The data source feeding the input parameter
- Whether it was already canonical (drop the call) or raw (push
  canonicalisation upstream)
- The chosen fix and rationale

## AC-3 — Quality gates green

- `bun run lint`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run test`
- `bun run build`

All four pass on the final main commit.

## AC-4 — No regressions in agent display

The beat table in the running app still shows correct agent labels
(Claude Opus 4.7, OpenCode openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6, etc.) —
no blanks, no doubled labels, no leaked "4.7" version on non-Claude
rows.

## AC-5 — Umbrella self-audit grep #2 passes after this lands

After this knot ships, running the foolery-2e97 contract self-audit:

```bash
grep -rn "toActiveAgentInfo\|normalizeAgentIdentity" src/ \
  | grep -v "src/lib/agent-identity.ts" \
  | grep -v "src/app/beats/" \
  | grep -v "__tests__"
```

Should return ONLY the sanctioned settings/hydration sites covered by
the P4 sibling knot — no terminal-manager hits. (If the P4 knot has
also shipped, the grep should be empty entirely.)

## AC-6 — Contract doc reference

`docs/knots-agent-identity-contract.md` § "Self-Audit" remains the
source of truth. If the existing grep filter needs to be tightened to
catch this class of regression, update the doc as part of this knot.
